# Manufactured Traction Research Vault V9

This vault adds a full algorithmic-model layer to the previous mathematical proof vault.

Total files before zip: 563

## New focus

- ranking equations
- candidate-generation bottlenecks
- feedback-loop models
- bandit/explore-exploit seed bias
- threshold cascade models
- social-proof posterior models
- coordination graph/null models
- recommender profile injection
- budget attribution pollution
- algorithmic dampening/countermeasures

## Safety framing

The models are designed for research, explanation, detection, ethics, and paper/slides. They do not provide an operational playbook for manipulating platforms.
